sheet.div: Copy these credentials now. The API key is shown only once. If you lose it, generate a new one — the old key will be revoked.

field.name: user_login
field.help: A login string, not necessarily an email. Newo's settings field labelled 'Username (Login Email)' accepts this value.

field.name: webhook_secret
field.help: HMAC-SHA256 shared secret. Newo signs each webhook with X-Newo-Signature; Odoo rejects 401 if the signature does not match.

div.p: Paste these values into your Newo dashboard at newo.ai.
Odoo Online detected. Newo will auto-derive the database name from the URL — you can leave it blank in the Newo dashboard if that field becomes optional.
